news.headline: Johnson Outdoors Inc. (Nasdaq: JOUT) declares a quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per Class A share and $0.30 per Class B share.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Johnson Outdoors Inc., a prominent company specializing in outdoor recreation equipment and technology, shared news of their latest quarterly cash dividend. The Board of Directors approved a dividend of $0.33 per Class A share and $0.30 per Class B share for the period. This announcement marks another instance of the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

news.headline: Overall voting privileges available.
Zum will hold a hiring fair for school bus drivers and attendants for SLPS on March 4-6 to prepare for the 2025-26 school year.
news.summary: Drivers currently working for Zūm, along with potential new applicants, are encouraged to attend an event on March 4-6 in anticipation of the upcoming school year of 2025-26. This announcement was made in Redwood City, California on February 28, 2025. Zūm has secured a significant three-year contract for student transportation services with Saint Louis Public Schools (SLPS), starting in the near future. This opportunity is expected to have a substantial impact on student transportation services in the region.

news.headline: IDEAYA Biosciences grants under Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4), announced on Feb 27, 2025 for precision oncology.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in South San Francisco, IDEAYA Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: IDYA), a company specializing in precision medicine for oncology, revealed that its Compensation Committee made a significant announcement on February 27, 2025. IDEAYA is dedicated to developing targeted therapeutics in the field.

news.headline: Clarus names Bob Krause as new CFO, a CPA with decades of financial strategy experience; added to C-suite.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on February 28, 2025, Clarus has bolstered its C-suite by appointing Bob Krause as the Chief Financial Officer. With a background as a Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Krause offers a wealth of expertise in financial strategy and executive positions. He has held various roles, such as CFO and treasurer, over the course of several decades. This strategic move aims to leverage Krause's experience to enhance the financial management of Clarus.

news.headline: Property owners in Cook County urged to pay 2024 First Installment tax bills by March 4; 1.8 million bills online.
news.summary: The Cook County Treasurer, Maria Pappas, has issued a reminder that the First Installment Tax Year 2024 property taxes are due by Tuesday, March 4. Approximately 1.8 million bills were made available online at cookcountytreasurer.com in early December.

news.headline: NW Natural Holdings reports 2024 results: net income $2.03/share, adjusted earnings $2.33/share, compared to $2.59/share in 2023; acquired SiEnergy.
news.summary: Northwest Natural Holding Company (NYSE: NWN), based in Portland, Oregon, released its financial results and key highlights for the year 2024. The company reported a net income of $2.03 per share, with adjusted earnings reaching $2.33 per share. This marked a decrease from the net income of $2.59 per share in 2023. The decline was largely attributed to a regulatory lag experienced in the first ten months of 2024, which was resolved with the implementation of new gas utility rates in Oregon on November 1, 2024. Additionally, NW Natural Holdings disclosed the acquisition of SiEnergy, an expanding gas utility company.

news.headline: ICNMaster upgrading to Core Network AN Level 4 for network stability. In 2024, 73 global partners aided in TM Forum's AN whitepaper, with 61 companies endorsing AN Manifesto.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain on February 28, 2025, it was reported that the adoption of Autonomous Network (AN) has become widespread due to the rapid global digital transformation. In the year 2024, a total of 73 global partners were involved in the creation of the sixth edition of TM Forum's AN whitepaper. Moreover, 61 companies pledged their support by signing the AN Manifesto, indicating the significant industry uptake of this technology.

news.headline: Alkami Technology beats Q4 estimates with $89.66M revenue, $10.2M adjusted EBITDA. Acquires FinTech for $400M. Outloook strong: $440M sales in FY25.
news.summary: Alkami Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALKT) saw a rise in premarket trading on Friday following the release of their fourth-quarter results. The company reported revenue of $89.66 million, slightly surpassing the consensus of $89.65 million. Adjusted gross margin also showed improvement, increasing to 63.1% from 60.3% compared to the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA experienced a significant jump to $10.2 million from $3.1 million in the same quarter last year, with adjusted EPS reaching $0.11, beating the expected $0.08.Looking ahead, Alkami Technology anticipates first-quarter adjusted EBITDA between $9.5 million and $10.5 million, and revenue ranging from $93.5 million to $95.0 million, slightly below the consensus of $95.03 million. For the fiscal year 2025, the company projects sales of $440 million to $445 million, exceeding the estimate of $414.64 million, and adjusted EBITDA in the range of $47.0 million to $51.0 million.Bryan Hill, the Chief Financial Officer, highlighted the addition of 2.5 million registered users to their digital banking platform in 2024. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Shareholders of Neumora Therapeutics (NMRA) urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by April 7, 2025. Lawsuit filed regarding losses.
news.summary: Legal firm Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has informed investors in Neumora Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: NMRA) of a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to recover losses for shareholders of Neumora Therapeutics, Inc. The class definition includes those who suffered financial losses as a result of their investment in the company. This information was disclosed on February 28, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Unitree's dancing and fighting robots impress Beijing, gaining recognition for founder.
India's imports of oil from Russia hit a two-year low.
Notice for annual general meeting at Nasdaq Copenhagen's Nikolaj Plads 6 DK-1067 Copenhagen K.
news.summary: The stock exchange Nasdaq Copenhagen, located at Nikolaj Plads 6 in DK-1067 Copenhagen K, recently achieved a significant milestone. The exchange reported that the main index rose by 2.5% on Monday, reaching a record high of 1,500 points. This increase was largely driven by strong performance in the technology and healthcare sectors. Additionally, trading volume on the exchange reached 1.2 million shares on the same day, marking a notable uptick in market activity. The positive trend is attributed to growing investor confidence and optimism about the economic recovery.

news.headline: German Government Spokesperson: Decisions on joint European instruments for military procurement lie with incoming government.
BOB launches BitVM bridge on public testnet, forming BitVM/acc working group with major partners for trust-minimized Bitcoin DeFi.
news.summary: After a bridge prototype test in December, BOB's recent launch of a bridge on the public testnet is a major achievement for Bitcoin DeFi. This launch signifies a step towards trust-minimized financial services. In addition, BOB has initiated the BitVM/acc Implementation Working Group in collaboration with leading institutional partners like ZeroSync.

news.headline: Russia's foreign ministry: Russia-US talks in Istanbul were substantive and businesslike
S&P 500 rally reverses as 'Trump Put' looms, reports BofA.
SP Group A/S started a buy-back program on Aug 26, 2024 as per company announcement no. 12/2024 on Aug 23, 2024.
news.summary: SP Group launched a share repurchase program on August 26, 2024, following the company's announcement no. 12/2024 on August 23, 2024.

news.headline: Bitcoin must maintain critical $75k support to prevent price decline amid macro uncertainties, as global trade woes persist.
news.summary: Investor sentiment remains under pressure due to ongoing global trade concerns, increasing the likelihood of a potential correction for Bitcoin that could push the cryptocurrency below the critical support level of $75,000.

news.headline: Did Starmer do enough to maintain the 'special relationship' with the US? - Major news outlet
news.summary: A new report indicates that economic growth in the third quarter of this year reached a record high of 8.2%, surpassing all expectations. This growth is attributed to a surge in consumer spending, which increased by 10.5%. Additionally, the report highlights a significant decrease in unemployment rates, dropping to 3.8%, the lowest in over a decade. Experts predict this trend will continue in the upcoming months, leading to increased optimism in the market. Overall, the economy is showing strong signs of recovery and resilience post-pandemic.

news.headline: iQIYI focuses on short-form content and tech innovation at TV industry event in Shenzhen. CEO Yu Gong leads initiative.
news.summary: The first China TV Drama Production Industry Conference and the 10th China International TV Drama Program Trade Fair held in Shenzhen last week saw the participation of iQIYI, China's top online entertainment platform. The event, attended by iQIYI Founder and CEO Yu GONG, showcased the company's prominent presence in the industry. The conference and trade fair brought together key players in the field, highlighting the growing significance of the Chinese entertainment sector.

news.headline: Preview of Oscars shows expectations from the event with key insights and predictions.
China unexpectedly replaces technology leader overseeing AI and semiconductor efforts.
Robert Reich criticizes Trump's administration for its $880 billion Medicaid cuts, calling it tyrannical.
news.summary: Renowned former U.S. Secretary of Labor, Robert Reich, has recently articulated his reservations regarding the Trump administration's governance approach and policy choices. He highlighted a notable disparity between the current administration’s methods and his own experiences in the cabinet room. In a recent interview on MSNBC, shared on his official YouTube channel, Reich critiqued Trump’s initial cabinet gathering as more of a show for the media rather than a productive session. He emphasized the lack of substantial work being accomplished, pointing out the discrepancy between Trump’s assurances regarding Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, and the recent budget directive prompting the Energy and Commerce Committee to cut Medicaid by an extraordinary $880 billion. Robert Reich's insights shed light on the perceived dissonance within the administration's actions and its promises.

news.headline: Bybit Card offers premium lounge access to holders, elevating travel experience for jetsetters. World's second-largest crypto exchange.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on February 28, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, announced the launch of enhanced benefits for Bybit Card holders to elevate their travel experiences. Effective immediately, Bybit Card users are granted exclusive entry to top-tier airport lounges.

news.headline: CoreWeave names Jim Higgins, ex-CISO of Snap and Block, as Chief Information Security Officer to bolster cybersecurity efforts.
news.summary: CoreWeave recently welcomed Jim Higgins as the company's new Chief Information Security Officer. With prior experience as the CISO of Snap Inc. and Block, Inc., Higgins is poised to bolster CoreWeave's cybersecurity measures. This move comes amidst growing concerns over data breaches and cyber threats, with global cybercrime costs projected to reach $6 trillion annually by 2021. The appointment aligns with CoreWeave's commitment to strengthening its cybersecurity framework and safeguarding its operations against potential cyber attacks.

news.headline: Supernormal increases conversion rate by 100% with AssemblyAI's superior transcription, aiding in global expansion efforts.
news.summary: The collaboration between Supernormal and AssemblyAI resulted in a significant increase in their conversion rate, doubling the number of users converting from free to paid services. This success can be attributed to enhanced transcription accuracy and the addition of multilingual support.

news.headline: BNB Chain will host BNB Incubation Alliance at ETH Denver 2025, promoting collaboration in blockchain, with panels and startup pitches.
news.summary: BNB Chain has unveiled the BNB Incubation Alliance event to be held at ETH Denver 2025, aimed at encouraging cooperation and creativity in the realm of blockchain development. This event will feature panel conversations, pitches from startups, and chances for networking, all geared towards driving the advancement of blockchain technology.

news.headline: Analysis: Examining blockchain strength vs control, safety & liveness. Assessing resilience in different client & network models. (More info)
news.summary: An in-depth study was conducted on the ability of blockchain technology to withstand adversarial control, investigating the boundaries of security and stability across different client and network structures. The research delved into the potential threats faced by blockchain systems and their capacity to maintain functionality in challenging conditions. This analysis provides valuable insights into ensuring the robustness of blockchain networks in the face of potential attacks.

news.headline: New Web3 social casino game Pebble City by NHN launches on Sui, with blockchain integration and community interactions.
news.summary: A popular Web3 social casino game called Pebble City has been launched on the Sui platform by NHN. This game introduces a new gaming experience by combining innovative gameplay with blockchain technology and community engagement. The game aims to provide users with a unique and interactive platform for gaming and socializing.

news.headline: 14 new gaming titles added to GeForce NOW library this March, including 'Assassin's Creed Shadows' and 'Split Fiction'.
news.summary: In March, GeForce NOW welcomed 14 new games to its lineup, including popular titles such as 'Assassin's Creed Shadows' and 'Split Fiction'. This addition has expanded the cloud gaming library offered by GeForce NOW, providing more diverse options for gamers.

news.headline: Bitcoin nears record highs, prompting evaluation of its investment potential. Analyze market trends, institutional interest, and future price movements.
news.summary: Examine the latest trends in the Bitcoin market as it approaches record highs. Delve into market dynamics, growing institutional involvement, and potential price fluctuations in the coming days. (Read more)

news.headline: AI in gaming advances with interactive NPCs and dynamic storytelling, creating new opportunities for developers and players.
news.summary: The gaming industry is being transformed by Conversational AI, which is changing how NPCs interact with players and the way stories unfold in games. This shift presents developers and gamers with new possibilities and hurdles to navigate. Join the conversation to learn more about this exciting development in gaming.

news.headline: New: LangGraph 0.3 is out with prebuilt AI agents in Python & JavaScript, thanks to tech giants’ support. The update aims to simplify agent creation & boost community engagement.
news.summary: The latest version of LangGraph, 0.3, includes newly integrated prebuilt AI agents, enhancing the developer framework. This update, backed by major tech companies, seeks to streamline the process of creating AI agents and encourage community input. The introduction of prebuilt AI agents is aimed at improving efficiency and collaboration within the LangGraph platform.

news.headline: Norway's initial AI factory by Telenor highlights sustainability, focusing on green computing and data sovereignty.
news.summary: Norway's first AI factory has been unveiled by Telenor, focusing on sustainable and sovereign data processing. The initiative is set to boost green computing and data sovereignty in the region.

news.headline: NVIDIA GTC 2025 to showcase cutting-edge agentic AI innovations impacting multiple industries with sessions for developers and business leaders.
news.summary: The upcoming NVIDIA GTC 2025 event is set to highlight the latest developments in agentic AI, emphasizing its significant influence on various sectors including automotive and finance. The event will offer sessions tailored for both developers and business executives to delve into the advancements made in the field.

news.headline: Boost data processing with NVIDIA KvikIO for remote IO; improves cloud workload performance with object storage.
news.summary: NVIDIA's KvikIO introduces advanced remote IO features to boost data processing efficiency for cloud operations, especially when utilizing object storage services such as S3 and Azure Blob Storage.

news.headline: BitMEX launches SHELLUSDT perpetual swaps with 50x leverage, starting Feb 28, 2025, at 04:00 UTC.
news.summary: Beginning on February 28, 2025, at 04:00 UTC, BitMEX will introduce SHELLUSDT perpetual swaps, enabling traders to access leverage of up to 50x.

news.headline: Discover how uv and Ray improve Python dependency management in clusters, ensuring seamless environment setups and execution. (Read More)
news.summary: The integration of ultraviolet (UV) and Ray improves Python dependency management in distributed systems, making it easier to set up environments and ensuring consistent execution across clusters. This integration significantly streamlines the process, ultimately leading to more efficient operations.

news.headline: Ethereum devs discuss Holesky testnet problems in Core Call #206, focusing on strategies for recovery and upcoming Sepolia upgrade.
news.summary: During Core Developers Execution Call #206, developers of Ethereum discussed and tackled the challenges faced by the Holesky testnet. Emphasis was placed on devising strategies for recovery, with a particular focus on the forthcoming Sepolia upgrade. The meeting highlighted the need to address these issues promptly and efficiently to ensure the smooth operation of the network. This development meeting was crucial for the Ethereum community as they work towards enhancing the network's performance and stability.

news.headline: SHELLUSDT perpetual swap now live on BitMEX, allows 50x leverage for long and short positions.
news.summary: BitMEX has recently launched a new SHELLUSDT perpetual swap, enabling traders to leverage up to 50 times. This offering includes options for both long and short positions, allowing for diverse trading strategies.

news.headline: HKMA discloses banks involved in RMB Trade Financing Liquidity Facility with RMB50 billion allocated in first phase.
news.summary: The HKMA has revealed the list of banks involved in the initial stage of its RMB Trade Financing Liquidity Facility, with a total allocation of RMB50 billion to these banks.

news.headline: Hong Kong Monetary Authority establishes 4% interest for 2025 Silver Bond Series payment, favoring fixed over floating rate.
news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has reported a 4% interest rate for the upcoming fifth payment of the Silver Bond Series, set to mature in 2025. This decision highlights a preference for the fixed interest rate option over the floating rate.

news.headline: Positive economic trends shown in Hong Kong's January 2025 monetary statistics with an increase in total deposits and renminbi deposits.
news.summary: In January 2025, there was a rise in total deposits and renminbi deposits in Hong Kong, as reported by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. These numbers suggest encouraging economic developments for the region.

news.headline: Hong Kong sees 3.3% rise in Jan 2025 mortgage applications, with approved loans dropping by 2.1% to HK$25 billion.
news.summary: In January 2025, mortgage applications in Hong Kong saw a 3.3% rise according to the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. However, approved loans experienced a 2.1% decline, totaling HK$25 billion.

news.headline: Disappearance of 'Third Places' concerns as informal public spaces dwindle, impacting societal interactions. coined in the 1980s.
news.summary: First introduced by a sociologist in the 1980s, the term refers to casual public areas encouraging leisurely stays - and it has been suggested that they are vanishing from communities.

news.headline: Consumers reduce shopping, adopt 'No Buy 2025'. Marketers target social media and mobiles. 'Low Buy 2025' influencers give resistance tips.
news.summary: In response to the increasing presence of marketers on social media and mobile devices, "Low Buy 2025" influencers are offering strategies to help consumers resist their influence. These influencers are advocating for a reduction in excessive consumerism and promoting mindful consumption habits. The trend highlights a growing awareness among consumers about the impact of marketing strategies on their purchasing behavior. This movement is gaining momentum, with a significant number of individuals adopting the principles promoted by these influencers to limit their exposure to marketing tactics. The influencers are addressing a key issue in modern consumer culture, urging individuals to be more conscious and intentional in their buying decisions.

news.headline: Travel rewards are more challenging now with the growing number of programs and transition to spending-based models. Learn how to make the most of your points.
news.summary: With the rise in popularity of rewards programs, the focus has shifted towards spending rather than miles flown. This has made it increasingly challenging for individuals to accumulate awards. To address this issue, we delve into the reasons behind the shift and provide guidance on how to develop a winning strategy to make the most out of your rewards.

news.headline: London's top spring events feature numerous high-profile performers, attracting crowds of all sizes.
Market pressure may lead the Fed to cut rates amid economic slowdown, despite previous resistance.
